title: SuperMelonMod
description: Entities, Armor, Weapons, Magic Artifacts and PVP/PVE content, all about Watermelons.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba8641eae0359334bc73eb3ecb7672c494b1e0a9.png)
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c21b2fac154628c0fde940f1f37fa504c733514.png)

## ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8996578189d13cc57510fbb7cee534386210d00a.png)SuperMelonMod
 
This mod adds many useful and crazy objects made with watermelons, expanding the uses of watermelons in the vanilla game and multiplying them to make them a very valuable material. Likewise, it adds ways to maximize efficiency in the most basic game processes, such as crafting. It also adds attributes and abilities to certain objects made of watermelon which as the mod updates progress, there will be more. Immerse yourself in a world where watermelons are useful and functional in both combat and exploration, have fun exploring all the capabilities of objects with abilities and discover strategies in combat. Have fun with the most complete watermelon mod.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c21b2fac154628c0fde940f1f37fa504c733514.png)

## ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8996578189d13cc57510fbb7cee534386210d00a.png)Entities:

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c8382e2d56e41efe5d24797b9f78fb2f10411c5.png)

### Glistem Seeker:
A small but powerfull creature that will appear if the player have "Glistem" in the inventory. It will seek for you and steal your glistems, for each glistem that it steal, it will become BIGGER and STRONGER. When it steal 10 glistem, it will be full powerfull and it will be soo dificult to kill

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e116da194e4d69be1a7d6f8853c3d0a9ee3a2818.png)

### Watermelon Goblins:
Followers of Scholar Watermelon Goblin. This goblins are powerfull when they are in big groups and also are immune to projectiles, they can give the player the effect of "RUPTURE" that will damage the player start running or swimming, this effect have 3 levels each level increase the damage. 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/5o0Lq4kB/images/37c6ec99b7e98d4938fe325562d4f091f8b073c9.gif)

### Scholar Watermelon Goblin:
Mini boss. This criature is the leader of the Watermelon Goblins. When this criature sets it attack target it will spawn 3 or 4 watermelon goblins from time to time to fight with him, then it have a 35% that when he receive a hit it will use his magic to teleport to a near place like a enderman. When his life if below 50% the percentage will increase to 65% per hit and it will spawn a Watermelon Goblin each time he teleport. It have a special projectile that have a lot of knockback and if the projectile falls on a block, it have a 80% to embed the block and 3 seconds later explode doing a lot of damage to all the entities that are nearby.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-MycBVSF6C8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c21b2fac154628c0fde940f1f37fa504c733514.png)

## ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8996578189d13cc57510fbb7cee534386210d00a.png)Melonite:

The most powerfull material in SuperMelonMod, with this material that you can find in the nether you can make the most powerfull armor with 4 diferent abilities that are usefull in PVP and PVE.


![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a129f263ff25c9fde4059bfc608178e0f6e52630.png)
